meaning: 锡耶纳[意大利中部城市]
examples: The next day we drove 33 miles to Siena (the Villa Arceno is a great place to stay while you are there).
Siena have one big injury concern, as Paul Codrea is still not fit.
I went to Siena for a few good reasons. I left Chicago for a million more.
The article 'Two days in Siena, Italy' was published in partnership with Lonely Planet.
Saint Catherine of Siena (1347 to 1380) is co-patron saint of Italy and one of Europe's patron saints.
